info.title: SmartTemplate.Cli
info.description: Jinja2-like CLI template generator using Scriban

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: SmartTemplate — Jinja2-like CLI template generator powered by Scriban

commands.name: render
commands.description: Render a template file or directory

options.name: --data
options.description: Path to a JSON or YAML data file

options.name: -o
options.description: Output file or directory path (may itself be a Scriban template string)

options.name: --ext
options.description: Template file extension used when scanning a directory [default: .tmpl]

options.name: --no-interactive
options.description: Skip interactive prompts defined in the data file (for CI/scripting) [default: False]

options.name: --plugins
options.description: Path to a directory containing plugin assemblies (*.dll)

options.name: --stdout
options.description: Write rendered output to stdout instead of files [default: False]

options.name: --clip
options.description: Copy rendered output to clipboard (can be combined with --stdout) [default: False]

arguments.name: input
arguments.description: Template file or directory containing .tmpl files

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run a template package defined in packages.yaml

options.name: --config
options.description: Path to the packages config file. When omitted, searches for 'packages.yaml' in the current directory, then for '.st/packages.yaml' walking up the directory tree.

arguments.name: package
arguments.description: Package ID to run (omit to pick interactively)

commands.name: install
commands.description: Download and install a plugin from NuGet

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update one or all installed plugins to the latest version

arguments.name: package
arguments.description: Plugin package ID to update (omit to update all)
